comment.text: The "Label" translation key is used to display a descriptive title for input fields, such as group names or room tags. It appears in a dialog box, specifically within the CreateEditGroupDialog and CreateEditRoomDialog components, where it provides context for users to enter a name. Translators should replace the English content with a translated version of "Name" while maintaining this descriptive purpose.
